title: DateRange
description: The date range identified by fromDate and toDate.

fromDate.description:
For a View, fromDate is used to fetch transactions that are aggregated on or after the specified date. This is a mandatory attribute for all rules, except rules that contain transactionId.

Expected format - yyyy-MM-dd. Note- The date is in UTC timezone instead of Local timezone.

Endpoints:
  • GET /views
  • GET /views/recommendation
  • POST /views
  • PUT /views

toDate.description:
For a View, toDate is used to fetch transactions that are aggregated on or before the specified date, but after the fromDate. This is a mandatory attribute for all rules, except rules that contain transactionId.

Expected format - yyyy-MM-dd.Note- The date is in UTC timezone instead of Local timezone.

Endpoints:
  • GET /views
  • GET /views/recommendation
  • POST /views
  • PUT /views
